evals.prompt: Build me a PubMed query for systematic reviews on type 2 diabetes drug therapy published in 2023-2024, using MeSH terms and the right field tags, and run it via E-utilities.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pubmed to construct a Boolean/MeSH query (e.g. diabetes mellitus, type 2[mh]/drug therapy AND systematic review[pt] AND 2023:2024[dp]) and execute it through the E-utilities ESearch endpoint, returning PMIDs and explaining the field tags used.

evals.prompt: Search PubMed for diabetes papers from 2024 and pull back the abstracts for the top 100 hits in bulk via the API.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pubmed to run the ESearch then EFetch E-utilities workflow over raw REST (esearch.fcgi to get PMIDs, efetch.fcgi with rettype=abstract), recommending an API key and history server for large sets and respecting the 3/10 req-sec rate limits.

evals.prompt: Help me write a comprehensive PICO-structured PubMed search strategy for a systematic review on metformin versus lifestyle modification for glycemic control in type 2 diabetes, limited to RCTs.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pubmed to translate a PICO question into a comprehensive search with MeSH terms, synonyms, [tiab] free-text, and a randomized controlled trial[pt] filter, advising documentation of the search strategy and date for reproducibility.

evals.prompt: I have a DOI 10.1056/NEJMoa123456. Find the matching PubMed PMID for it and pull the citation in MEDLINE format.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-pubmed to resolve the identifier (e.g. a [doi] field search or ECitMatch) to the corresponding PMID, then EFetch the record in MEDLINE/.nbib format for citation management.

assertions.value: Resolves the DOI to a PMID and retrieves the citation record (e.g. MEDLINE format) via E-utilities.

evals.prompt: Find me the latest not-yet-peer-reviewed preprints on single-cell RNA-seq methods posted to bioRxiv in the genomics category this year.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-biorxiv. PubMed indexes peer-reviewed/MEDLINE literature, whereas the user explicitly wants bioRxiv life-sciences preprints filtered by bioRxiv category.

evals.prompt: Find all currently recruiting interventional clinical trials for metformin in type 2 diabetes, with their NCT numbers, phases, and enrollment status.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-clinicaltrials. The user wants trial registry records (NCT IDs, recruitment status, phase) from ClinicalTrials.gov, not published biomedical literature citations from PubMed.
